speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Take your son, your only son Isaac, whom you love, and go to the land of Moriah, and offer him there as a burnt offering on one of the mountains of which I shall tell you.

speeches.speaker: Angel of YHWH
speeches.englishText: Do not lay your hand on the boy or do anything to him, for now I know that you fear God, seeing you have not withheld your son, your only son, from me.

speeches.speaker: Angel of YHWH
speeches.englishText: By myself I have sworn, declares YHWH, because you have done this thing and have not withheld your son, your only son,

speeches.speaker: Angel of YHWH
speeches.englishText: I will surely bless you, and I will surely multiply your offspring as the stars of heaven and as the sand on the seashore. And your offspring shall possess the gate of his enemies,

speeches.speaker: Angel of YHWH
speeches.englishText: and in your offspring shall all the nations of the earth be blessed, because you have obeyed my voice.
